description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline using the openjdk:10-jre-slim Docker image and two stages: build and deploy. In the build stage define a build job that caches the Gradle wrapper and caches under the key $CI_PROJECT_NAMESPACE, runs ./gradlew clean build -x javadoc then extracts the test coverage by piping cat build/reports/tests/coverage/index.html | grep -o 'Total[^%]*%' | sed -e 's/Total.*>/test_coverage=/g', and publishes artifacts that expire in 10 minutes, include the path build/reports/tests and JUnit reports from build/test-results/test/TEST-*.xml, with coverage regex /test_coverage=(.*)%/. In the deploy stage add a pages job that depends on the build job, runs only on the master branch, executes mkdir -p public, mv docs/javadoc public/api, and mv build/reports/tests public, and publishes the public/ directory as a GitLab Pages artifact.
